1 # Task 13: Drag and Drop with dnd-kit 2 3 ## Context 4 The Kanban board needs drag-and-drop so users can move cards between columns and reorder them within a column. The backend already has fractional positioning support (`PATCH /api/cards/:id` with `{ column, position }`) and the `useBoard` hook already exposes `moveCard(id, targetColumn, position)` with optimistic updates and rollback. No drag-and-drop library is installed yet. 5 6 ## Architecture Decisions 7 - **dnd-kit packages**: `@dnd-kit/core`, `@dnd-kit/sortable`, `@dnd-kit/utilities` 8 - **Collision detection**: `closestCenter` (works well for vertical lists) 9 - **Strategy**: `verticalListSortingStrategy` inside each column's `SortableContext` 10 - **Column IDs** (for dnd-kit): API format â€” `"ready"`, `"in-progress"`, `"done"` 11 - **Card IDs** (for dnd-kit): the card's `id` UUID directly 12 - **Activation constraint**: `distance: 8` px for `MouseSensor` â€” prevents accidental drags, preserves click-to-open-modal behavior 13 - **Empty columns**: each Column also uses `useDroppable` (same ID as columnId) so cards can be dropped onto empty columns 14 - **DragOverlay**: renders a copy of the dragged card (floats under cursor, not in the DOM flow); placed inside `DndContext` but outside `SortableContext` 15 - **Position formula**: midpoint of neighbors in the target column after removing the active card 16 - **Utility functions**: `findCardColumn`, `calculatePosition`, and `COLUMN_IDS` are defined at **module level** (outside the Board component function) in `Board.jsx` so they can be exported and unit-tested independently 17 18 ## Files to Create or Modify 19 20 | File | Change | 21 |---|---| 22 | `client/package.json` | Add dnd-kit deps | 23 | `client/src/components/Board/Board.jsx` | DndContext + DragOverlay + onDragStart + onDragEnd | 24 | `client/src/components/Board/Board.test.jsx` | Add dnd-kit mocks + tests for drag handler logic | 25 | `client/src/components/Board/Column.jsx` | SortableContext + useDroppable, accept `columnId` prop | 26 | `client/src/components/Board/Column.test.jsx` | Add `columnId` to all existing renders + sortable/droppable tests | 27 | `client/src/components/Board/CardTile.jsx` | useSortable hook integration | 28 | `client/src/components/Board/CardTile.test.jsx` | Add dnd-kit mock + drag state/style tests | 29 | `client/src/components/Board/CardTile.css` | `.card-tile-dragging` styles | 30 | `client/src/components/Board/Board.css` | `.card-drag-overlay` styles | 31 | `client/src/components/Board/Column.css` | `.column-drag-over` styles | 32 33 --- 34 35 ## Subtask-by-Subtask TDD Plan 36 37 --- 38 39 ### Subtask 1 â€” Install and configure dnd-kit with DndContext 40 41 #### Red (tests first) 42 43 **File**: `Board.test.jsx` â€” add dnd-kit mocks at the **top of the file** (module level, outside any describe block) and add a new `describe('drag and drop setup')` block. 44 45 The mocks must be added as the very first `vi.mock()` calls in the file so they apply to all describe blocks (including existing ones). 46 47 Also update the existing imports: 48 - Add `act` to the `@testing-library/react` import: `import { render, screen, fireEvent, within, act } from '@testing-library/react'` 49 - Add `afterEach` to the vitest import: `import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach, afterEach } from 'vitest'` 50 51 Add a global `afterEach` (alongside the existing `beforeEach`) to clear all mock call histories between tests. This is required because `DEFAULT_STATE.moveCard` is a module-level `vi.fn()` whose call history persists across tests â€” without clearing it, `not.toHaveBeenCalled()` assertions fail after any test that does call `moveCard`: 52 53 ```js 54 afterEach(() => { 55 vi.clearAllMocks() 56 }) 57 ``` 58 59 ```js 60 // Capture handlers for use in tests 61 let capturedOnDragStart 62 let capturedOnDragEnd 63 64 vi.mock('@dnd-kit/core', () => ({ 65 DndContext: ({ children, onDragStart, onDragEnd }) => { 66 capturedOnDragStart = onDragStart 67 capturedOnDragEnd = onDragEnd 68 return
{children}
69 }, 70 closestCenter: vi.fn(), 71 DragOverlay: ({ children }) =>

SortableContext: ({ children }) => <>{children}, 79 useSortable: vi.fn(() => ({ 80 attributes: {}, listeners: {}, setNodeRef: vi.fn(), 81 transform: null, transition: null, isDragging: false, 82 })), 83 verticalListSortingStrategy: 'vertical', 84 arrayMove: vi.fn((arr, from, to) => { 85 const result = [...arr] 86 const [item] = result.splice(from, 1) 87 result.splice(to, 0, item) 88 return result Drop card on own column header â†’ no change 669 - Verify drag overlay appears during drag with visual rotation/shadow effect 670 - Verify dragged card placeholder becomes faded (opacity) in original position 671 672 ## Key Utilities to Reuse 673 674 | Utility | File | Purpose | 675 |---|---|---| 676 | `moveCard(id, col, pos)` | `hooks/useBoard.js` | API call + optimistic update + rollback | 677 | `columnToKey(col)` | `hooks/useBoard.js` | `'in-progress'` â†’ `'in_progress'` | 678 | `arrayMove(arr, from, to)` | `@dnd-kit/sortable` | Reorder array for same-column position calculation | 679 | `CSS.Transform.toString(t)` | `@dnd-kit/utilities` | Convert transform object to CSS string | 680 681 ## Key Correctness Notes 682 683 1. **Hooks before early returns**: `useSensors`, `useSensor`, and `useState(null)` for `activeCard` must be declared before the `if (loading)` and `if (error)` early returns in Board.jsx (React Rules of Hooks). 684 685 2. **No-op guard for same-column column-drop**: When `isDroppedOnColumn && sourceKey === targetKey`, skip immediately â€” do NOT call moveCard, even if other cards exist in the column. 686 687 3. **`listeners` destructuring**: Always use `const { onKeyDown: dndKeyDown, ...restListeners } = listeners ?? {}` and handle `dndKeyDown` in the merged `handleKeyDown` to avoid overwriting the modal-open keyboard behavior. 688 689 4. **`DragOverlay` placement**: Must be a direct child of `DndContext`, NOT inside any `SortableContext` or the `.board` div. 690 691 5. **`useDroppable` ID = `columnId`**: Column IDs used for `useDroppable` (`"ready"`, `"in-progress"`, `"done"`) are different from card UUIDs, so no ID collision with `SortableContext` items. 692 693 6. **`Column.test.jsx` migration**: Every existing `render()` call must add `columnId="ready"` (or the appropriate column id) â€” otherwise `useDroppable({ id: undefined })` is called. 694
